outputs.main.sas:
library(rtables)
library(dplyr)
library(emmeans)
library(car)
library(haven)

# Read ADADAS dataset
adadas <- read_sas("adadas.sas7bdat")  # Adjust path as needed

# Filter to Efficacy population
adadas_eff <- adadas %>%
  filter(ANL01FL == "Y" & EFFFL == "Y")  # Assuming standard flags

# LOCF imputation: carry forward last non-missing post-baseline value
adadas_locf <- adadas_eff %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  arrange(ADY) %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL_LOCF = ifelse(is.na(AVAL), 
                       zoo::na.locf(AVAL, na.rm = FALSE, fromLast = FALSE), 
                       AVAL)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Keep only post-baseline records (if needed) and the primary endpoint
adadas_analysis <- adadas_locf %>%
  filter(PARAMCD == "ACTOT" & !is.na(AVAL_LOCF) & AVISITN > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    TRT01PN = as.factor(TRT01PN),
    SITEGR1 = as.factor(SITEGR1),
    BASE = AVAL_LOCF  # baseline value (assume AVAL at AVISITN=0)
  )

# ANCOVA model
model <- lm(AVAL_LOCF ~ TRT01PN + SITEGR1 + BASE, data = adadas_analysis)

# Type III SS
anova_model <- Anova(model, type = "III")

# Dose-response trend test (linear contrast)
contrast_weights <- c(-1, 0, 1)  # Placebo, Low, High
trend_test <- summary(glht(model, linfct = matrix(contrast_weights, nrow = 1)), 
                      test = Ftest())

# LS means and pairwise comparisons
lsmeans <- emmeans(model, ~ TRT01PN)
pairwise <- contrast(lsmeans, method = "pairwise", adjust = "none")

# Extract LS means and 95% CI
lsmeans_df <- as.data.frame(lsmeans) %>%
  mutate(
    `LS Mean (SE)` = paste0(
      sprintf("%.2f", emmean), " (", sprintf("%.2f", SE), ")"
    ),
    `95% CI` = paste0(
      "(", sprintf("%.2f", lower.CL), ", ", sprintf("%.2f", upper.CL), ")"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(TRT01PN, `LS Mean (SE)`, `95% CI`)

# Pairwise comparison results
pairwise_df <- as.data.frame(pairwise) %>%
  mutate(
    Comparison = paste(contrast),
    `Difference (SE)` = paste0(
      sprintf("%.2f", estimate), " (", sprintf("%.2f", SE), ")"
    ),
    `95% CI` = paste0(
      "(", sprintf("%.2f", lower.CL), ", ", sprintf("%.2f", upper.CL), ")"
    ),
    `p-value` = sprintf("%.4f", p.value)
  ) %>%
  select(Comparison, `Difference (SE)`, `95% CI`, `p-value`)

# Build table using rtables
lyt <- basic_table(
  title = "Table 14-3.01: Primary Endpoint Analysis - ADAS-Cog Total Score (LOCF)",
  subtitles = "Efficacy Population"
) %>%
  split_cols_by("TRT01PN", 
                split_fun = keep_split_levels(c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low", "Xanomeline High"))) %>%
  add_colcounts() %>%
  analyze("AVAL_LOCF", 
          afun = function(x, .spl_context) {
            n <- sum(!is.na(x))
            mean_val <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
            sd_val <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)
            in_rows(
              "n" = n,
              "Mean (SD)" = paste0(sprintf("%.2f", mean_val), " (", sprintf("%.2f", sd_val), ")"),
              .formats = c("n" = "xx", "Mean (SD)" = "xx")
            )
          },
          table_names = "descriptive") %>%
  analyze("AVAL_LOCF", 
          afun = function(x, .spl_context) {
            # LS means from model
            lsmeans_row <- lsmeans_df[lsmeans_df$TRT01PN == .spl_context$col, ]
            in_rows(
              "LS Mean (SE)" = lsmeans_row$`LS Mean (SE)`,
              "95% CI" = lsmeans_row$`95% CI`,
              .formats = c("LS Mean (SE)" = "xx", "95% CI" = "xx")
            )
          },
          table_names = "lsmeans") %>%
  append_topleft("Parameter")

# Add pairwise comparisons as separate rows
pairwise_rows <- pairwise_df %>%
  mutate(
    row_name = paste0("  ", Comparison, " Difference")
  )

# Build final table
final_table <- lyt %>%
  build_table(adadas_analysis)

# Add pairwise comparison rows manually
for (i in seq_len(nrow(pairwise_rows))) {
  final_table <- insert_rrow(
    final_table,
    rrow(
      pairwise_rows$row_name[i],
      pairwise_rows$`Difference (SE)`[i],
      pairwise_rows$`95% CI`[i],
      pairwise_rows$`p-value`[i]
    )
  )
}

# Add trend test row
trend_pval <- sprintf("%.4f", summary(trend_test)$test$pvalues[1])
final_table <- insert_rrow(
  final_table,
  rrow("Dose-Response Trend Test p-value", "", "", trend_pval)
)

# Output as RTF
rtf_file <- "14-3.01_Primary_Endpoint_Analysis.rtf"
write_rtf(final_table, file = rtf_file)
